references.passiveText: I've heard of an untapped source of rare materials somewhere {location_hint}. Nobody has claimed it yet.
references.triggerDialogue: A prospector I trade with found a deposit of extraordinary quality deep in the hills {location_hint}. They couldn't extract it alone: too many {enemy_type} in the area: but they marked the location on a map. If someone with your skills went in, they could secure enough {quest_item} to supply half the craftspeople in the region. The prospector would want a cut, but there'd be plenty for everyone.

references.passiveText: There's a collector in a neighboring settlement who pays handsomely for unusual finds.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} has built quite a reputation: they collect rare {quest_item} from across the region and pay well above market rate. Eccentric, yes, but reliable. If you come across anything unusual in your travels, they'd be worth a visit. Just don't mention you heard about them from me: I owe them a delivery I haven't finished yet.
